mapper.sql: id, order_id, order_name, order_bz, create_time, update_time, user_id, real_name, file_num, file_size, order_state, state, order_reason, download_path
mapper.select: SELECT a.id,a.order_id,a.order_name,a.data_use,a.create_time,a.update_time,a.user_id,a.real_name,a.file_size,a.order_state,a.state,a.order_reason,a.download_path,b.USERNAME as username FROM order_info a LEFT JOIN sys_user b on a.user_id = b.USER_ID where order_state = 2 and b.USERNAME is not null
mapper.update: UPDATE order_info SET order_state = #{status},message_status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT identifier FROM `order_list` where order_id = #{orderId} GROUP BY identifier;
SELECT * FROM htht_cluster_schedule_product_info where id in ( select data_id from order_list where order_id = #{orderId} and identifier = #{identifier} )

SELECT DISTINCT dataInfo.satellite_id as satellite,CONCAT(disk.loginurl,"/",taskFile.relative_path) as original_path,dataInfo.id as id,fileInfo.tif_file_path as tif_path,o.data_type FROM `htht_dms_sate_data_info` as dataInfo LEFT JOIN order_list o ON o.data_id = dataInfo.id LEFT JOIN htht_dms_sate_data_file_info as fileInfo ON dataInfo.id = fileInfo.data_id LEFT JOIN htht_dms_sate_data_task_file as taskFile ON fileInfo.source_file_id = taskFile.id LEFT JOIN htht_dms_sys_disk as disk ON disk.id = taskFile.disk_id where order_id = #{orderId}
select * from htht_dms_sate_data_file_info where data_id = #{id} and data_type = 1
SELECT * FROM htht_basis_data_info where tree_id in ( select data_id from order_list where order_id = #{orderId} and identifier = #{identifier} )
SELECT data_id,query_time as time,data_type FROM `order_list` where order_id = #{orderId} and identifier = #{identifier}

SELECT a.id,a.order_id,a.create_time as order_time,a.order_state,b.order_log,a.message_status FROM `order_info` a LEFT JOIN order_message b on a.order_state = b.order_state LEFT JOIN sys_user u on a.user_id = u.USER_ID where u.USERNAME= #{userName} and a.message_status != 2 order by a.message_status asc,a.create_time desc

SELECT a.id as d_id,a.file_path as d_file_path, a.issue,a.cycle,a.mark, b.id as f_id,b.file_name as f_file_name,b.file_path as f_file_path FROM `htht_satellite_thematic_data_info` a LEFT JOIN htht_satellite_thematic_data_file_info b on a.id = b.data_id where a.id in
#{id}

SELECT e.text FROM `htht_cluster_schedule_product_info` a LEFT JOIN htht_cluster_schedule_product b on a.product_id = b.id LEFT JOIN htht_cluster_schedule_data_category c on c.id = b.tree_id LEFT JOIN htht_cluster_schedule_data_category e on e.id =c.parent_id where a.id = #{id}

-- SELECT d.name FROM `htht_thematic_data_file_info` a -- LEFT JOIN htht_thematic_data_info b -- on a.thematic_id = b.id -- LEFT JOIN htht_data_category c -- on b.tree_id = c.id -- LEFT JOIN htht_data_category d -- on c.parent_id = d.id -- where a.id = #{dataId}
SELECT id FROM `htht_uus_log_sys_data_category` where data_type = #{dataType} and data_mark like CONCAT("%",#{dataName},"%")
SELECT * FROM `htht_uus_log_sys_data_count` where date = #{date} and data_category_id = #{id}
